arts.ttl: “Chelsea career is over” – Enzo Maresca makes big statement on Mykhailo Mudryk failed drug test
arts.sum: Chelsea fans were shocked this week as news emerged that Mykhailo Mudryk had tested positive for a banned substance and will be suspended from competing until further notice. The Ukrainian has missed the London club’s last five games and has not featured since a Europa Conference League match at Heidenheim on November 28.
